where_is_this_place_exactly.answer: southern and southeastern scholarly-magical house-domain inside The Principalities

who_built_it.answer: The safest current reading is that House Mimolot emerged through house, communal, or institutional development over time; the corpus does not assign a single fully explicit founder.
